Communication Engineering Summer Training Program 2023 SUMMER TRAINING PROGRAM DEPARTMENT OF ELECTRONICS AND COMMUNICATION ENGINEERING JAYPEE UNIVERSITY OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY WAKNAGHAT, SOLAN, H.P. -173234 SUMMER TRAINING PROGRAM, 03 – 15 JULY 2023 Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, Himachal Pradesh, India is offering summer training for the duration of 2 weeks in July 2023 in different areas of Electronics and Communication Engineering to M.Tech./ B.Tech students. Faculty or students from any other course may also contact the coordinator for enrollment in the training program. ABOUT THE DEPARTMENT: The Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) offers B.Tech, M.Tech and Ph.D courses. As the name suggest this stream of engineering deals with the research, design, development and testing of electronic and communication equipment. After completing four year engineering degree in ECE, graduates will have strong theoretical foundation, good design experience and exposure to research and development. The stream also strives to solve engineering problems related to Communication Systems, Electronic, Computer and other related industries. The curriculum is designed in such a way to develop the ability among students to synthesize data and technical concepts from applications to product design. SUMMER TRAINING MODULES: Following are the training modules with respective module coordinators floated for the upcoming summer training program: Module Title of the Module Module Coordinator 1 Mitsubishi Industrial Automation for Electronic Equipments Expert from MEI Pvt. Ltd. 2 Digital Logic Design using Verilog HDL Dr. Harsh Sohal 3 Antenna Design for IoT Applications Dr. Naveen Jaglan 4 Sensor and Smart Instrumentation for IoT Applications Dr. Emjee Puthooran 5 Processing and Assessment of Low-Quality Visual Information Data Dr. Nafis U. Khan 6 Programmable Logic Controller using Mitsubishi Set Up Dr. Salman Raju Talluri 7 Machine Learning for Wireless Communications Dr. Alok Kumar TRAINING AND ACCOMMODATION DETAILS: Training Duration Total Fee Details of the Fee 2 Weeks (Without hostel)* Rs. 1000/- Training Fee 2 Weeks (With hostel) Rs. 9,200/- Rs. 8,200/- (Hostel Fee) + Rs. 1000/- (Training Fee) *Hostel Fee - Includes Lodging, Food (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner) Training Fee – Consumable to be used for the summer training program of the student PG / Private hostel / Sharing accommodation are available around JUIT, assistance might be provided by the organizers for students who do not wish to stay in hostel. SUMMER TRAINING APPLICATION PROCEDURE: 1. Fee for the training program is to be submitted by Online Mode (RTGS/NEFT) ONLY . No other mode of payment will be accepted. 2. Fill the Online Application form for the summer training program with Personal Details, Photograph, and Details of Payment Made (UTR No. etc). (Please DO NOT SEND ANY HARD COPIES). FORM LINK: https://forms.gle/v6vQMrrxe4kbVZAz6 3. Confirmation of your registration would be mailed within Ten days of receipt of online form, after confirmation of fee from the Accounts. 4. Summer training would be allotted on First Come First Serve (FCFS) Basis, with maximum 25 Seats. LAST DATE FOR APPLICATION: Last date for receiving completed application forms for SUMMER TRAINING PROGRAM – 2023 (by Online mode only) – 25th June 2023 Documents to be submitted (to be carried with you and submitted on your arrival at JUIT) at the time of Registration: 1. Training letter issued from Dean/HoD/Training Coordinator of your Institute/Department. 2. Your latest CV/Resume. 3. Three passport size photographs (For Identity Card, laundry card, registration form etc.) FEE PAYMENT: Payment of the fees can be made by ONLINE MODE ONLY (RTGS/NEFT) in favor of “Jaypee University of Information Technology ” , as per details below: Name of the University Jaypee University of Information Technology Address: P.O. Waknaghat, Teh. Kandaghat, Distt. Solan-173234 Bank Name: Punjab National Bank Branch Address: Waknaghat Branch, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat Account No.: 0427032100000010 IFSC Code: PUNB0637100 Type of Account: Current MICR Code: 171024077 Student is Advised to Keep a Screen Shot of The Payment Receipt FEE REFUND POLICY: Training Fee once submitted will NOT BE REFUNDED; as the Kits, Chemicals and Media etc required for the training would already been purchased. Hence, please ensure that you would be able to attend the training before application and fee deposit. However, Hostel fee if deposited and student does not undergo the training due to genuine / unavoidable reasons would be returned. Covid-19 Disclaimer: According to present guidelines by Himachal Pradesh Govt. the proposed Summer Training would be successfully organized on the dates mentioned. However, any Govt order due to Covid-19 scenario leading to closure of JUIT for students would impact the proposed Summer Training. In any such situation registered students would be duly informed. PLACES OF TOURIST ATTRACTION: The University is situated in the neighborhood of Shimla, 3 KM off the NH22 (Ambala-Kalka-Waknaghat-Shimla road). It is just half an hour drive to Shimla from campus. The nearby places of tourist attractions are Shimla (24 Km), Chail (45 Km), Kufri (45 Km), Kasauli (50 Km) and many more.
